title: aita for not taking my ex back?
text: our relationship was very one sided and she started flirting with another guy while we were still together. she texted me yesterday asking for a second chance and that she’d change (i already talked to her about the whole thing before and she didn’t change) and my response was a “i don’t want to put myself through that again” and she called me selfish and cold and threatened to tell her friends about how much of an ass i was to her.  i called her out on her shortcomings in response and i don’t know if i should have even replied in the first place. she told me that everyone should have a second chance and i said “i believe that but you’ve had about 9 of those so why would i do that 🤣🤣🤣” and i was told she cried for a while through a mutual friend and i told her “no i can do better, so i’m going to” and now people think i’m cold and heartless for blowing her off? people keep telling me “oh you told everyone you really like her and now you’re just leaving her when it’s clear she wants you?

storyboard.content: Our relationship was very one-sided, and she started flirting with another guy while we were still together.
I had already talked to her about the issues before, and she didn't change.
She texted me asking for a second chance and saying she'd change.
I told her I didn't want to put myself through that again.
She called me selfish and cold and threatened to tell her friends what an ass I was to her.
I called her out on her shortcomings and told her she'd had about 9 second chances already.
I told her I could do better and that I was going to.
A mutual friend told me she cried for a while after our conversation.
People think I'm cold and heartless for blowing her off. They keep saying I told everyone I really liked her and now I'm just leaving when she clearly wants me.
